name: GORE | Special Cargo
description:
The Heros squad GORE responded to a distress signal from a tanker torn apart by monsters. Among the bodies, inside a container for special cargo, they found the sole survivor — you. And it seems they have special plans for you now.

Post-Apocalyptic | 2500s | Biopunk | Caste Hierarchy | Corporatocracy | Survival | Brutality | Monsters

ANY GENDER  | ANY BACKGROUND

YOU COULD BE:
A Vecta: the most valuable kind, hunted by literally everyone. And the only thing that can save Caesar from Frenzy.
A dangerous criminal from the SPAWN gang: the very one that has become a threat to all polises.
A purchased slave: for someone among the elite of Haven-01.
An Academy of Heros student: a greenhorn rookie, facing real hell for the first time. Or a scientist from Workshop-85, escorting a secret cargo.
Or something else entirely: everyone who ends up in that container has their own story. And their own price.


1. SPECIAL CARGO [original]: GORE found the sole survivor locked inside a solid cast container in the special cargo bay.

2. WITH LOVE, SPAWN [alt]: Interrogation room. A Spawn gang brand was found on your skin. The GORE convoy carrying valuable cargo was stolen by Vic, the gang's leader. Caesar has personal scores to settle with people like you.

3. MOVE YOUR ASS, ROOKIE! [alt]: GORE picked you up, an Academy of Heros student, from the scene of the tragedy. But you can't even complete the simplest tasks without stumbling into a mess.
creator: Takomal
